message:
refactor(session_correlation): deep cx threading through 2 pub fns (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Fifth caller-migration tick in the strangler-fig phase (after
reports.rs, export.rs, diagnostic.rs, search_explain.rs).

One prerequisite storage cx-first sibling added first:
- `get_agent_session_with_cx(cx, session_id)`

Storage cx-first coverage now at 53/140 methods.

Then two pub `_with_cx` functions in session_correlation.rs are
upgraded to route all internal storage calls through cx-first
siblings:

1. `correlate_and_persist_for_pane_with_cx`:
   - storage.get_pane → get_pane_with_cx
   - select_session_record (internal get_sessions_for_pane) →
     new private select_session_record_with_cx that uses
     get_sessions_for_pane_with_cx
   - storage.upsert_agent_session → upsert_agent_session_with_cx

2. `refresh_cass_summary_for_session_with_cx`:
   - storage.get_agent_session → get_agent_session_with_cx
   - storage.upsert_agent_session → upsert_agent_session_with_cx

The doc comment on `correlate_and_persist_for_pane_with_cx` which
previously noted "storage calls stay on the ambient path" is updated
to reflect the new deep-threading.

Legacy `correlate_and_persist_for_pane`, `refresh_cass_summary_for_session`
and the private `select_session_record` preserved unchanged.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 49/49
session_correlation tests pass, including the existing
`correlate_and_persist_with_cx_override_updates_session` and
`refresh_cass_summary_with_cx_missing_session_matches_legacy`
regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
